bond.brief: CRITICAL: Complete data outage prevents analysis. VIX spike to 29.49 signals stress. Recommend CASH position and immediate data sourcing review before any duration exposure.

currency.brief: Maintain USD bullish stance. Risk-off surge validates previous flip. Long USD/CHF, short AUD/USD. Avoid USD/JPY longs above 157.80 intervention risk. Target DXY 99.50 breakout.

commodities.brief: Maintain LONG energy stance. WTI consolidating at $91 vs $95 target. Elevated VIX supports risk premiums. Reduce natural gas exposure given contango structure.

metals.brief: Maintain bearish metals stance. Gold $5175 copper $5.84 extreme despite VIX spike. Previous real rate headwinds likely persist. Recommend shorts via DUST/JDST, target gold sub-$4800.
